creator: joneum@FreeBSD.org
text:
Heya Franco :-)

Path "head/net/igmpproxy/files/0001-Revert-Try-to-fix-problems-with-strict-aliasing.patch" is missing the svn:keywords property (or an fbsd:nokeywords override)
== Additional errors may compound and may not be accurate ==
Path "head/net/igmpproxy/files/0002-Revert-Include-config.h-before-any-other-files-to-ma.patch" is missing the svn:keywords property (or an fbsd:nokeywords override)
== Pre-commit problem count: 2

Can you re-add a new patch with solved this?
